scenario: During modification mode on a Vanguard Airlines Camunda 8.8 instance covering 220 booking changes, an operator has selected a freshly generated scope in the instance history. The operator now needs to recall the exact two input fields the Add Variable form on the variables panel requires before the entry can be staged.
question: Which two fields does the Add Variable form on a new scope require the operator to fill out?

options.text: The Add Variable form requires the operator to fill out a Name field for the variable identifier and a Value field for the variable value before staging the entry as a pending modification
The Add Variable form requires the operator to fill out a Variable Key field and a Variable Type field, where the type selects between string, number, or boolean before staging the entry
The Add Variable form requires the operator to fill out a Scope Id field for the target scope and a Value field, with the variable name being derived from the scope id selection above
The Add Variable form requires the operator to fill out a Path field that references a parent variable and a Value field that overrides the parent value on the selected scope

a.text: Correct. The docs say that on the new scope the operator clicks Add Variable in the variables panel and fills the Name and Value fields for the variable to add before the entry is staged as a pending modification.

b.text: Incorrect. The documented form takes Name and Value; there is no Variable Key plus Variable Type pair with an explicit string, number, or boolean selector in the Add Variable form.

c.text: Incorrect. The form does not collect a Scope Id field; the scope is fixed by which scope the operator selected in the instance history before opening the Add Variable form.

d.text: Incorrect. The Add Variable form takes Name and Value rather than a Path plus Value pair that overrides a parent variable on the selected scope.

explanation: The Add Variable form for a new scope takes a Name field and a Value field. Once the operator blurs out of the last field with valid values, the entry is staged as a pending modification on the selected scope.
